title: Emergency Care
description: 24/7 emergency services with trained specialists ready to handle any medical emergency.
details: Our emergency department operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week with state-of-the-art equipment and experienced physicians.

title: General Medicine
description: Comprehensive general medical services for routine checkups and consultations.
details: Our general medicine team provides preventive care, diagnosis, and treatment for common health conditions.

title: Cardiology
description: Specialized heart and cardiovascular disease treatment.
details: Advanced cardiac care including diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of heart diseases.

title: Orthopedics
description: Treatment for bone, joint, and muscle disorders.
details: Comprehensive orthopedic services including surgery, rehabilitation, and physical therapy.

title: Pediatrics
description: Specialized healthcare services for children and infants.
details: Compassionate pediatric care from newborns through adolescence.

title: Surgery
description: Advanced surgical procedures with experienced surgeons.
details: General and specialized surgical services with modern operating facilities.

title: Neurology
description: Treatment for neurological disorders and brain conditions.
details: Expert neurological diagnosis and treatment using latest technology.

title: Diagnostics
description: Advanced diagnostic imaging and laboratory services.
details: State-of-the-art imaging and testing facilities for accurate diagnosis.
